# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Set working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    gunicorn \
    python3-pip \
    postgresql-client \
    redis-server

# Expose necessary ports
EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

# Copy application code
COPY . /app/

# Install Python dependencies
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

# Run Nginx as a service
RUN echo "daemon off;" >> /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

# Run Gunicorn as a service
WORKDIR /app/api
CMD ["gunicorn", "--workers 3", "wsgi:app"]

# Run PostgreSQL as a service
ENV PGDATA=/var/lib/postgresql/data
RUN pg_createcluster -u postgres 13 main

# Run Redis as a service
CMD ["redis-server"]
